issues.description:
**As a** Samsung Ads platform,  

'**I want to** validate incoming conversion events against defined schema,   

**So that** I reject malformed data before persisting to storage.

**Acceptance Criteri

**As a** client consuming the Conversion API,    
**I want** to authenticate my requests using a simple Bearer token (generated manualy for client),    
**So that** only authorized clients can access

**As a** FinServ advertiser engineering team,   **I want to** receive clear error messages when my API requests fail,   **So that** I can debug integration issues.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

* \[ \] H

**As a** Samsung Ads platform,   

**I want to** persist validated conversion events to Snowflake as raw JSON,   

**So that** downstream processing can consume the data.

‌
